prompt: Build a PostService with @api('/posts') for CRUD operations: list posts with @get('') returning Post[], get single post with @get('/{postId}'), create with @post(''), update with @put('/{postId}'), and delete with @del('/{postId}'). Use @path() for path parameters and @query() for filtering.
expected_output: Complete CRUD service with all HTTP methods and proper parameter decorators
expectations: @get('') method returns Promise<Post[]> for listing posts
@get('/{postId}') method for getting single post with @path('postId')
All methods throw autoGeneratedError() as placeholder
Imports include get, post, put, patch, del, path, query, body decorators
